languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

languages.text: "Вдвойне жаль, что ее труп сильно поврежден. Я и Нунциус провели беглую аутопсию, чтобы определить, пригоден ли мозг к стазис-консервированию в качестве опытного образца, но обнаружили лишь конгломерат тканей, деформированных в результате ранения".

"It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."
languages.original_text: "Вдвойне жаль, что ее труп сильно поврежден. Я и Нунциус провели беглую аутопсию, чтобы определить, пригоден ли мозг к стазис-консервированию в качестве опытного образца, но обнаружили лишь конгломерат тканей, деформированных в результате ранения".

traits.locale_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

"It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

"It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

languages.text: «El mal estado de su cadáver es doblemente lamentable. Nuncius y yo ejecutamos una autopsia rutinaria para ver si se podía conservar el cerebro en suspensión como muestra, pero solo había un amasijo de tejidos deformados por la lesión».
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

traits.locale_text: «El mal estado de su cadáver es doblemente lamentable. Nuncius y yo ejecutamos una autopsia rutinaria para ver si se podía conservar el cerebro en suspensión como muestra, pero solo había un amasijo de tejidos deformados por la lesión».

languages.text: 「彼女の死体がひどく損傷していることは、二重に残念です。ヌンキウスと私は、その脳が試験標本としてステイシス保存に適しているかを判断するため、ざっと解剖を行いましたが、見出されたのは、損傷によって変形した組織の塊だけでした」
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

traits.locale_text: 「彼女の死体がひどく損傷していることは、二重に残念です。ヌンキウスと私は、その脳が試験標本としてステイシス保存に適しているかを判断するため、ざっと解剖を行いましたが、見出されたのは、損傷によって変形した組織の塊だけでした」

languages.text: “更令人遗憾的是，她遗体损毁得太过严重。努恩修斯和我进行了一次初步尸检，以确认其大脑是否适合作为测试样本静滞保存，但我们发现的，只有因创伤而彻底变形的组织团块。”
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

traits.locale_text: “更令人遗憾的是，她遗体损毁得太过严重。努恩修斯和我进行了一次初步尸检，以确认其大脑是否适合作为测试样本静滞保存，但我们发现的，只有因创伤而彻底变形的组织团块。”

languages.text: "Es ist wirklich bedauerlich, dass ihr Körper so stark beschädigt ist. Nuncius und ich haben ein Autopsie vorgenommen, um zu ermitteln, ob das Gehirn für eine Stasenkonservierung geeignet ist, fanden aber nur durch die Verletzung zerstörtes Gewebe."
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist wirklich bedauerlich, dass ihr Körper so stark beschädigt ist. Nuncius und ich haben ein Autopsie vorgenommen, um zu ermitteln, ob das Gehirn für eine Stasenkonservierung geeignet ist, fanden aber nur durch die Verletzung zerstörtes Gewebe."

languages.text: « C'est très regrettable que son cadavre soit aussi endommagé. Nuncius et moi avons procédé à une autopsie sommaire afin de déterminer si son cerveau pourrait faire office d'échantillon test en le préservant via la stase, mais nous n'avons trouvé qu'un amas de tissus gravement détériorés par les blessures. »
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."

traits.locale_text: « C'est très regrettable que son cadavre soit aussi endommagé. Nuncius et moi avons procédé à une autopsie sommaire afin de déterminer si son cerveau pourrait faire office d'échantillon test en le préservant via la stase, mais nous n'avons trouvé qu'un amas de tissus gravement détériorés par les blessures. »

languages.text: "Cesedinin ağır hasar görmüş olması çifte pişmanlık verici. Nuncius ve ben, beyninin bir test numunesi olarak stazda korunmaya uygun olup olmadığını belirlemek için üstünkörü bir otopsi yaptık ancak yalnızca yaralanmayla deforme olmuş bir doku yığını bulduk."
languages.original_text: "It is doubly regrettable that her corpse is badly damaged. Nuncius and I performed a cursory autopsy to determine if the brain was suitable for stasis-preservation as a test sample, but we found only a conglomeration of tissue deformed by the injury."
